verses.sanskrit: धृतराष्ट्र उवाच | धर्मक्षेत्रे कुरुक्षेत्रे समवेता युयुत्सवः | मामकाः पाण्डवाश्चैव किमकुर्वत सञ्जय ||
verses.transliteration: dhṛtarāṣṭra uvāca | dharmakṣetre kuruksetre samavetā yuyutsavaḥ | māmakāḥ pāṇḍavāścaiva kimakurvata sañjaya ||
verses.translation: Dhritarashtra said: O Sanjaya, what did my sons and the sons of Pandu do when they assembled on the holy field of Kurukshetra, eager to fight?

verses.sanskrit: सञ्जय उवाच | दृष्ट्वा तु पाण्डवानीकं व्यूढं दुर्योधनस्तदा | आचार्यमुपसङ्गम्य राजा वचनमब्रवीत् ||
verses.transliteration: sañjaya uvāca | dṛṣṭvā tu pāṇḍavānīkaṃ vyūḍhaṃ duryodhanas tadā | ācāryamupasaṅgamya rājā vacanamabravīt ||
verses.translation: Sanjaya said: Seeing the army of the Pandavas arrayed in battle formation, King Duryodhana approached his teacher and spoke these words.

verses.sanskrit: अयनेषु च सर्वेषु यथाभागमवस्थिताः | भीष्ममेवाभिरक्षन्तु भवन्तः सर्वशः स्थिराः ||
verses.transliteration: ayaneṣu ca sarveṣu yathābhāgamavasthitāḥ | bhīṣmamevābhirakṣantu bhavantaḥ sarvaśaḥ sthirāḥ ||
verses.translation: Let all the warriors stand in their respective positions in the army, protecting Bhishma from all sides.
